gt_sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.source FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN income AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member GROUP BY T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.source ORDER BY SUM(T2.amount) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, i.source
FROM income i
JOIN member m ON i.link_to_member = m.member_id
ORDER BY i.amount DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which students manage to generate the highest income. State his/her full name along with the income source.
